creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pav         2011-04-08 07:28:10 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www/tinyproxy        Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/tinyproxy/files  patch-src__acl.c 
  Log:
  - Fix security vulnerability: ACL lists allow all clients to connect when an IP
    range is configured
  
  PR:             ports/156264
  Submitted by:   Roger Marquis <marquis@roble.com> (maintainer)
  Security:       yes!
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.35      +1 -1      ports/www/tinyproxy/Makefile
  1.1       +55 -0     ports/www/tinyproxy/files/patch-src__acl.c (new)
